basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation Vapi (ESIC Vapi) has published the Contractual Specialist Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt. No. 39/ESICH-Vapi/Med.Br./SR/FTCS/PTCS(Ptfile)/2021. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Contractual Specialist positions. Candidates aged not more than 69 years as on the date of interview and holding a PG Degree/PG Diploma in the concerned specialty along with registration with the Medical Council of India are eligible to participate in the recruitment process. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 17 July 2026. Candidates can access t

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not to exceed 69 years as on date of interview.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 69 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council of India.
qualification.details: Contractual Specialist: PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council of India. Experience: PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years' experience after acquiring PG Degree OR minimum of 5 years' experience after acquiring PG Diploma.

salary_details.pay_scale: FTCS: Rs. 131067/- per month, PTCS: Rs. 60,000 per month
salary_details.details: Full Time Contractual Specialist (FTCS): Rs. 131067/- fixed per month. Includes Transport allowance with DA as per rule, to be revised from time to time. Leave @ 04 days for each month of work on pro-rata basis, encashable up to 30 days/year. Part Time Contractual Specialist (PTCS): Rs. 60,000 per month. Includes Emergency call duty Rs. 15,000. Rs. 800/hour for extra hours above 16 hours/week.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vapi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Vapi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Vapi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vapi Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Contractual Specialist: PG Degree/Diploma in concerned specialty and registered with Medical Council of India. Experience: PG Degree or equivalent with 3 years' experience after acquiring PG Degree OR minimum of 5 years' experience after acquiring PG Diploma.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vapi Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vapi Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 69 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vapi Salary / Stipend 2026
content_sections.text: Full Time Contractual Specialist (FTCS): Rs. 131067/- fixed per month. Includes Transport allowance with DA as per rule, to be revised from time to time. Leave @ 04 days for each month of work on pro-rata basis, encashable up to 30 days/year. Part Time Contractual Specialist (PTCS): Rs. 60,000 per month. Includes Emergency call duty Rs. 15,000. Rs. 800/hour for extra hours above 16 hours/week.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Vapi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Vapi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 17 July 2026. Candidates should report at the venue on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Contractual Specialist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Contractual Specialist position at ESIC Vapi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a PG Degree/Diploma in the concerned specialty and registration with the Medical Council of India.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Contractual Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is not to exceed 69 years as on the date of the interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Full Time Contractual Specialist (FTCS)?
faq.answer: The salary for FTCS is Rs. 131067/- fixed per month, along with allowances and leave benefits.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Part Time Contractual Specialist (PTCS)?
faq.answer: The salary for PTCS is Rs. 60,000 per month, with additional allowances for emergency call duty and extra hours.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring two recent passport size photographs, one set of attested photocopies, and originals of testimonials.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in-Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ESIC Vapi hospital located?
faq.answer: The ESIC Vapi hospital is located in Vapi, Gujarat, with the pincode 396195.
